name: ai-chat-speed-booster
description: Browser extension that speeds up AI chat apps (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) by lazily loading conversation messages with FIFO management

scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm run build:all
scripts.safari:convert: DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcrun safari-web-extension-converter dist/safari --project-location safari-app --app-name "AI Chat Speed Booster" --bundle-identifier com.noah.aichatspeedbooster --force
scripts.safari:fix-signing: sed -i '' '/"CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY\[sdk=macosx\*\]" = "-";/d' 'safari-app/AI Chat Speed Booster/AI Chat Speed Booster.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj'
scripts.safari:setup: pnpm run build:safari && pnpm run safari:convert && pnpm run safari:fix-signing
scripts.test: pnpm run build:all && pnpm exec playwright test --project=build --project=extension
scripts.test:build: pnpm run build:all && pnpm exec playwright test --project=build
scripts.test:extension: pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm exec playwright test --project=extension
scripts.test:safari: pnpm run build:safari && pnpm exec playwright test --project=safari
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm exec playwright test --project=integration
